morning.title: How LLMs work
morning.summary: This article provides an in-depth explanation of how Large Language Models (LLMs) work, including their architecture, training, and applications.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM acquired Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider, expanding its cloud computing capabilities and portfolio.

morning.title: The Smart TV in Your LivingRoom Is a Node in the AIScraping Economy
morning.summary: This article discusses how smart TVs can be exploited as nodes in the AIScraping economy, highlighting the potential risks and vulnerabilities associated with connected devices.

morning.title: Zig Zen Update
morning.summary: The Zig programming language has received a significant update, introducing new features, improvements, and bug fixes to enhance its performance and usability.

morning.title: Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft’s board to go ‘founder mode’ with startup Manus
morning.summary: Reid Hoffman, a well-known entrepreneur and investor, is leaving Microsoft's board to focus on his new startup, Manus, marking a significant shift in his career.

gym.title: Legendary Investor Dan Loeb on AI, Credit, & Third Point’s $25B Strategy
gym.summary: Dan Loeb, a renowned investor, shares his insights on AI, credit markets, and Third Point's $25B strategy, offering valuable perspectives on the current financial landscape.

gym.title: The Power of Real Optimism
gym.summary: Dr. Deepika Chopra discusses the power of real optimism, exploring its benefits and applications in personal and professional life, and providing practical tips for cultivating optimism.

gym.title: Building Agent Interfaces: Lessons from Chrome DevTools (MCP) for Agents
gym.summary: Michael Hablich shares lessons from Chrome DevTools (MCP) for agents, focusing on building agent interfaces and discussing the challenges and opportunities in this area.

gym.title: How to Disagree Better
gym.summary: Julia Minson provides guidance on how to disagree better, offering strategies for constructive conflict resolution and effective communication in personal and professional relationships.

gym.title: Uber CEO on AI, Autonomous Vehicles, and the Future of Transportation
gym.summary: The Uber CEO shares his vision for the future of transportation, discussing the role of AI, autonomous vehicles, and other emerging technologies in shaping the industry.

gym.title: Beyond Transcription: Building Voice AI That Understands Conversations
gym.summary: Hervé Bredin discusses the challenges and opportunities in building voice AI that understands conversations, highlighting the importance of moving beyond transcription and towards more advanced voice recognition capabilities.
